title: Prince's Adventures +
description: A Modpack Aimed for the Greatest Vanilla+ Adventure Experience
body:
# The Greatest Vanilla+ Adventure Awaits You!
This modpack keeps everything you love about vanilla but makes things smoother, prettier, and just more fun! It’s all about small quality-of-life tweaks and visual upgrades that make the game feel fresh without changing what makes Minecraft, well… _Minecraft_!
### What's inside?
Find out here:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/zKwwU_cQzRg" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

### IMPORTANT:
The SuperBetterGrass mod was copyrighted so you'll have to get it from the respected creator(s).
